name: Commenting Craft
description: Write comments that add genuine value, spark conversation, and build your presence without self-promotion.

name: Substack Growth Playbook
description: Systematic strategies for growing a Substack newsletter from zero to a loyal subscriber base.

name: Hook: First Line
description: Open every newsletter with a single sentence that forces the reader to continue — curiosity, tension, or a violated assumption.

name: Subject Line Science
description: Engineer email subject lines using behavioral triggers that maximize open rates — treat it as a conversion problem, not a labeling problem.

name: Writer Network Flywheel
description: Build a compounding growth loop through strategic Substack recommendations and reciprocal collaborations.

name: One-to-Many Content Repurposing
description: Extract maximum reach from each newsletter by decomposing it into native-format content for Twitter/X and LinkedIn.

name: Subscriber Retention Ladder
description: Prevent churn with a tiered re-engagement system — the right intervention at each stage from onboarding to win-back.
